title: Spring Breeze, Going to Tokyo, Miss Caretaker
overview: Aki arrives in Tokyo ready to make a fresh start. The first step is finding his dorm Sunohara House and meeting the residents of his new home.

title: Special Training, Snip Snip, Fears
overview: Aki and Ayaka work on getting more in sync, Aki gets Ayaka's input on a new look, and the residents of Sunohara House learn about each other's fears.

title: Elders, Getting Changed, Being a Man
overview: Aki gets to know the President a little better, Sumire decides to make Aki a target of observation, and Yuri secures Aki's help with a project.

title: Start of the Rainy Season, Marriage, Lap Pillow
overview: The residents of Sunohara House discuss their ideal marriage, Aki and Ayaka fix leaks in the roof, and Ayaka takes care of her residents after they get caught in the rain.

title: Melons, Teacher, Drunk
overview: Aki gets a taste of summer, Yuri gives Aki a lesson in photography, and Ayaka and Aki have a special day together.

title: High School Girl, Swimsuits, Summer Break
overview: A former resident of Sunohara House returns for a visit, Aki gets to know her better, and everyone goes to the public pool.

title: Ghosts, Homework, Massage
overview: Aki gets spooked, Yuri passes on her secret technique, and Nana helps her friends finish their homework.

title: Ear Cleaning, Lost, Fireworks
overview: Aki learns about one of Ayaka's special skills, the residents of Sunohara House go to a festival, and Aki finds himself separated from the group.

title: Roasted Sweet Potato, Nursing, Mascot
overview: Aki and Ayaka help Ms. Yatsuho, Nana comes to visit, and Aki takes care of Ayaka.

title: Costumes, Penguins, Playing Big Sister
overview: Aki runs into Nana and her crew, Ayaka takes Aki on a special outing, and the other residents ask Aki what it's like to have siblings.

title: Assault, Super Sweet, Hospitality
overview: Aki's sister Matsuri arrives at Sunohara House, Ayaka undergoes a test, and Matsuri bonds with Aki.

title: Kotatsu, Year End, Santa
overview: Aki and Ayaka stay warm under the kotatsu, Christmas comes to Sunohara House, and the residents welcome the new year together.
